web_results.title: Champions League last-16 draw: Dates, schedule & format - BBC Sport
web_results.description: The Puskas Arena in Budapest, Hungary will host the 2025-26 final on 30 May.

web_results.title: Champions League round of 16 draw: Who can play who, head-to-head records | UEFA Champions League | UEFA.com
web_results.description: The 2025/26 UEFA Champions League round of 16 draw takes place on Friday – we confirm each team's possible opponents and look back at their previous meetings across UEFA competition. Teams can be drawn against clubs they faced in the league phase or from the same national association. ... Top eight from the league phase (alphabetical order) Arsenal, Barcelona, Bayern München, Chelsea, Liverpool, Man City, Sporting CP, Tottenham

web_results.title: Champions League: Premier League clubs to learn last-16 opponents in Friday's draw | Football News | Sky Sports
web_results.description: Also on Tuesday night, Atletico Madrid set up a last-16 tie with either Tottenham or Liverpool. Bodo/Glimt eliminated Inter Milan and will face either Manchester City or Sporting. Meanwhile, Bayer Leverkusen will play Bayern Munich or Arsenal. Round of 16 draw: February 27 Round of 16: March 10-11 and 17-18 Quarter-finals: April 7-8 and 14-15 Semi-finals: April 28-29 and May 5-6 Final: Saturday May 30 · Image: PSG are the current Champions League holders · The 2025/26 Champions League final will take place in Budapest at the Puskas Arena on Saturday May 30.

web_results.title: Spurs qualify for 2025/26 UEFA Champions League
web_results.description: Tottenham Hotspur have qualified for the 2025/26 UEFA Champions League. Spurs earned their place in the competition after winning the UEFA Europa League final 1-0 in Bilbao, Spain, on Wednesday with a goal by Brennan Johnson in the 42nd minute.
